---
title: "mcp.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/skills_db/cachebro/packages/cli/src/mcp.ts"
loc: 177
complexity: 13
logic_score: 1.60
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 2.23
overall_score: 2.55
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [McpServer](file://@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/mcp.js)
- [StdioServerTransport](file://@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/stdio.js)
- [z](file://zod)
- [createCache](file://@turso/cachebro)
- [resolve](file://path)
- [existsSync](file://fs)
- [mkdirSync](file://fs)
- [readFileSync](file://fs)
- [randomUUID](file://crypto)
- [fileURLToPath](file://url)
- [dirname](file://path)
- [join](file://path)

### Exports
- `__filename`
- `__dirname`
- `getCacheDir`
- `dir`
- `packageJson`
- `META_NAMESPACE`
- `startMcpServer`
- `startMcpServer`
- `cacheDir`
- `dbPath`
- `watchPaths`
- `sessionId`
- `createCache`
- `server`
- `result`
- `text`
- `stats`
- `results`
- `successfulPaths`
- `result`
- `text`
- `footer`
- `stats`
- `stats`
- `text`
- `transport`
